/usr/bin/gcc -g CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/binary_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/data_win.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/data_win_print.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/ini.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/input_recording.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/instance.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/json_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/json_writer.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/noop_file_system.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/runner.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/runner_keyboard.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/vm.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/vm_builtins.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/n3ds/main.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/n3ds/n3ds_file_system.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/n3ds/n3ds_renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/n3ds/stb_impl.c.o -o cinnamon   -L/opt/devkitPro/libctru/lib  -L/opt/devkitPro/portlibs/3ds/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/devkitPro/libctru/lib:/opt/devkitPro/portlibs/3ds/lib -lcitro2d -lcitro3d -lctru -lm
